title: Course: COSC 470 - Artificial Intelligence
description: An introduction to agent-oriented artificial intelligence covering foundations and history, intelligent agents, search techniques, knowledge and reasoning, propositional and predicate logic, forward and backward chaining, resolution, and applications including mechanical theorem proving and expert systems.
prerequisites_text: COSC 220 completed with a grade of C or higher
content:
COSC 470 - Artificial Intelligence
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 220 completed with a grade of C or higher
Offered: Fall, Spring

Description: An introduction to agent-oriented artificial intelligence covering foundations and history, intelligent agents, search techniques, knowledge and reasoning, propositional and predicate logic, forward and backward chaining, resolution, and applications including mechanical theorem proving and expert systems.

Curriculum role:
  - BS Computer Science: Group C
  - BS Cloud Computing: Group C

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=55603
